hotel_name: Beach House Fort Lauderdale, a Hilton Resort

reviews.title: The worst hotel I have ever visited in my life!
reviews.text: The room pictures from my Agoda booking and the room I received are totally different! I can't believe that the hotel front desk ignored my case, even though I showed them all the pictures through the Agoda booking website...
reviews.response:
Dear Jaeeun,

Thank you for bringing this to our attention. I’m very sorry to hear about the discrepancy between the room you booked and the one you were assigned, as well as the way you felt your concern was handled at the front desk. This is certainly not the experience we want for our guests. Please know I will personally review your reservation details with Agoda and our team to ensure this situation is properly addressed. Your feedback is very important, and I truly appreciate you sharing it with us so we can make it right.

Sincerely,

Beach House Fort Lauderdale, A Hilton Resort
reviews.room_type: OCEAN VW STUDIO STE 1 KG MOB ACC W/TUB

reviews.title: I was expecting the room I booked through booking. But Hotel gave us a different room. I called them to resolve the issu
reviews.negatives: I was expecting the room I booked through booking. But Hotel gave us a different room. I called them to resolve the issue, however, hotel didn’t take any actions even didn’t reply my email

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: I recently had a disappointing experience at this hotel. The accommodations were not as described on the website, which was misleading. Additionally, they advertised breakfast as part of the stay, but when I checked in, I was informed that the breakfast option was not available. Overall, this experience did not meet my expectations, and I would advise potential guests to clarify these offerings before booking.
reviews.room_type: Ocean Vw Studio Ste 2 Qn Mobility Acc W/Tub

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
My wife left a bracelet on the bed side table, as we walked out the room door the cleaner went into the room, and we drove about 2 miles from the property when my wife remembered she left her bracelet on the bed side table, we went straight back to the hotel and a member of staff took my wife to the room, the room had been cleaned and the bracelet had been taken and not handed in, my wife complained to the hotel but they said the cleaner hasn't found a bracelet, from leaving the room to going back to the room we as no longer than 25 minutes. lovely hotel but a not having honest staff is very poor especially in the hotel industry.

very very upset & disappointed with the cleaning staff, as you know this bracelet doesn't have legs so where the bloody hell did it go ???

The hotel itself was fantastic but this clearly spoilt our stay at this property!!!

reviews.title: Dissapointing
reviews.text:
Housekeeping left our room door open all day on 2 occasions ,despite complaint.
Failed to turn up to clean room on 1 day.
$42 / day for car parking is excessive then $35/day to use pool fascilites etc.

reviews.title: We won’t be back.
reviews.negatives: The elevators had ridiculously long lines.  The property has 4 but only 2 were operational for hotel guests and one is exclusively used for the rooftop bar (separate from hotel).  Our basic room was actually part of a suite with a shared hallway entrance.  It was awful.  None of this was communicated to us.  The bathroom had mold.  And housekeeping insisted on delivering hangers despite my husband specifically asking them to come back.  It was an expensive three nights where our money would have been better spent elsewhere.

reviews.title: Too much money
reviews.text: My husband and I paid for an ocean view room. You could only see the ocean if you were standing on the balcony, even if you sat down you couldn't see it. On top of that you had to look at construction. The room won't even be an "ocean view room" soon. Wish I didn't waste my time and money on that room.

reviews.title: See above
reviews.positives: The neigh was very loud, smoking week with kids in their rood, overpriced and not worth it, us the bell service charges me twice and i still haven’t been refunded
reviews.negatives: See above

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The hotel charged me for taxes which were included in the original price I had paid Agado our stay.

reviews.title: Worst Hilton experience
reviews.negatives: Rooms old and dirty. Staff mostly rude except one front manager who was really helpful.

reviews.title: Nice hotel would have liked evening entertainment
reviews.text:
I found the staff and the hotel good, but would have liked some evening entertainment in the hotel.
Room service and hotel restaurant as you would expect was quite expensive .

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Staff money hungry under paid scammers

reviews.title: Pay more than advertised
reviews.text:
Staying at the hotel is much more expensive than advertised. There was no mentioning of the resort fee PER DAY of $ 35+ tax and no mentioning of parking cost at about $ 44 per day.
It ended up at 40% more expensive than advertised.
The cost of the hotel seemed reasonable compared to others but it was not.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
My experience at the Hilton Beach Resort in Fort Lauderdale was beyond disappointing, especially considering it was supposed to be a birthday celebration, a rare leisure trip for me. Let's start with the atrocious bellhop and valet service – not only was the valet fee over $50 with no alternative, but when I needed help with my luggage, the bellhop was nowhere to be found. It felt like the hotel was operating with a skeleton crew; getting assistance was nearly impossible.

As for the room, it was a nightmare. Disgusting doesn't even begin to describe it. Stains on the furniture, grime in the corners, light bulbs not working, phones in rooms don’t make any calls, and black mold in the closet made me feel utterly repulsed. Considering I take my health very seriously, waking up next to black mold was not only sickening but also deeply worrying for my well-being. And the amenities were a joke – the hot tub was so disgusting I wouldn't dare dip a toe, and the pool wasn't even heated enough for use. It was as if they wanted to ruin everyone's vacation, especially mine.

To make matters worse, after addressing our numerous issues with the assistant manager on duty, he promised a $50 credit, which never materialized. It's just another example of the Hilton Fort Lauderdale Beach Resort's lack of integrity. And the double charge for the resort fee on the receipt was a blatant scam. This experience was a complete letdown and ruined my birthday. Do yourself a favor and avoid Hilton, especially this one at all costs.

reviews.title: Not worth the money
reviews.text: The hotel was so busy , but a professional and polite front desk, featuring 'Jasmina.'is awesome . The bellman provided exceptional service. However, the room is quite small, feels like im in the closet of a conjoined room, lacks a luggage rack, and doesn't match the advertised river view ( no such thing River view) making it less satisfactory for the $900 something spent.
reviews.response:
Dear Natthaya,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We’re delighted to hear that our front desk team, especially Jasmina, and our bell staff made such a positive impression. Your kind words will certainly be shared with them. At the same time, we’re sorry to learn that your room did not meet expectations regarding size, amenities, and view. We understand how important these details are, especially given the value of your stay, and we appreciate you bringing this to our attention. Your comments will be reviewed with our team as we continue to improve the guest experience.

Sincerely,

Beach House Fort Lauderdale, A Hilton Resort

reviews.title: Ruined vacation
reviews.negatives:
Room not as promised . Stayed two years ago in much better room . I booked same room this time and gotten terrible room with bad air conditioning terrible mattress. Room not as described. That’s the pictures of our “suite” how they want to call it.  It does not represent even close we booked .It is totally joke . Our room should be over 750 feet it was the most 450 , maybe smaller . There is nobody who is taking you seriously over there .
There are some pictures what are offered on website versa what really was offered to us .Such of disappointment at least . Watch out on the pillows . I believe any one star hotel would offer better .Maybe the did not like the fact we have booked with booking.com . I don’t know why . You should get what you paid for . Really disappointed ☹️ 
Can’t believe how ridiculously small the bedroom was .
And Front Desk clerks acting like nothing is wrong . Like almost we that description of that place does not match . And yes it does . I don’t understand why we have gotten so bad place. Maybe when you book directly thru Hilton there is better chance . Or when you are Hilton Honors . They would never treated Hilton Honors like they treated us .

reviews.title: mice beaches
reviews.text: very good, with big well furnished rooms with great location

reviews.title: Room not as booked and rude front desk staff
reviews.positives: Our room was not what I booked and paid for and I want a refund. The manager refused to help us because we didn't book directly with them.
reviews.negatives: The room was not a junior suite. It was not a suite at all

reviews.title: Unexpected charges
reviews.text: When checking in ones said on Agoda we would pay 150 deposit which is normal when checking in a hotel but it 150 per day plus a 50 dollar resort a day and 60 a day parking fee. We were the deposit would also be used for food at the hotel but that was wasn't the case
reviews.response:
Dear inniyyah, thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We understand how important it is to have clear information about charges before your stay. The $150 deposit mentioned on Agoda is a standard hold for incidentals, but it is applied per day of your reservation. We apologize for any misunderstanding regarding this.

We truly appreciate your comments and will review how this information is communicated to ensure greater clarity for future guests. If you have any further questions or need assistance with your current charges, please let us know—we’re here to help.
reviews.room_type: OCEAN VW STUDIO STE 1 KG MOB ACC W/TUB

reviews.title: Terrible
reviews.negatives: The valet service was terrible. They lost my keys for 40 minutes and had me waiting out front with my kids and belongings like the homeless. When I complained I was met with a nonchalant and dismissive attitude. I have complained many times without avail. At this point I feel I will never stay at a Hilton again. I am so close to getting on social media with my 307k followers

reviews.title: Perfect beach location
reviews.text: The hotel is well located. The lobby is very pretty with many options for food and drinks. The restaurants were outstanding. Specially Nube rooftop. Prices on the high side, but worth it. The room was so big and perfect for a family of 4 specially having  the extra half bath was a big plus. A few things could be improved. The hallways were dirty.. The towels in room and beach were so tiny and rough like sand paper. Not what you would expect from a 4 star resort.Also not enough plates , glasses and utensils in the kitchen. Most of the staff were very accommodating and friendly. I would go back if the price was the same as  i paid. It was a good value for the money
reviews.response:
Dear Maeve,

From our spacious suites to our wonderful walkable location that allows easy access to the beach and other area treasures, we’re delighted to hear you and your family enjoyed our location, lobby atmosphere, and especially your dining experiences at Nube Rooftop. It’s also great to know the spacious room and extra half bath were a perfect fit for your family.

We are sorry to hear about the concerns with hallway cleanliness, towels, and kitchen supplies. Your feedback is very helpful, and we’ll be sharing it with our team to improve these areas.

We’re so glad you found your stay to be a good value and that you would consider returning. We look forward to welcoming you back for an even better experience next time.

Sincerely, 
Beach House Fort Lauderdale, A Hilton Resort

Dining room seperated from Bed room, and wonder kitchen with Micro wave, electric cooking and baking machine. Knife+ plate and bowl will be served as requirement. Ocean view (partial). Free 2 hours bicycle-rent per day . Nice trip with good experience in Fort Lauderdale Beach

reviews.text: The hotel is nice and clean. I really enjoyed the live band at the pool.  The rooftop bar is beautiful. The only problem was two elevators were broken, and they were crowded and hot.
reviews.response:
Dear Krystin,

Thank you for your recent stay here with! We’re delighted to hear that you enjoyed the cleanliness of our hotel, the live band by the pool, and the beautiful rooftop bar. At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by the elevator service during your stay. Please know our team is actively working to improve this, and we appreciate your patience and understanding. We hope to welcome you back for an even smoother experience soon.

Sincerely,

Beach House Fort Lauderdale, A Hilton Resort
reviews.room_type: Ocean View Studio Suite 1 King Bed

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Well the booking.com website said under room amenities.  Hot tub.  Then under bathroom amenities it said spa tub.  So I only booked the room because there was a hot tub in it.  Then when I arrived there was only a spa tub in the bathroom.  I called the front desk and talked to Lou.  He said there is no hot tubs in any rooms.  And that he would switch us to a different room.  This was sat morning about 11am.  He said he would get back to me.  Then we took a walk on the beach.  On our way out at 230 we stopped at the desk and talked to a lady about switching rooms.  She went in back and confirmed with lou that this move was in progress.  So we walked on the beach.  Then went back to the room.  I had my phone with me all day just in case he called.  Then Sunday at about 11am I called the front desk again.  Lou said he had tried to call me twice the day before and that the room was ready.  So about 1pm we switched rooms on Sunday.  My other half was leaving that day after we went to Boca Raton to visit a friend.  So then I came back spent the night in the new room which had much better views on the 16th floor.  But it was just ridiculous that we never really got to spend any time in that room as I was also leaving early the next day.

Bottom line is I didn't enjoy the 1st room as it only had a partial ocean view and was just on the 7th floor which was just one floor above the pool floor without a pool view. We had a view of the four seasons hotel just across the terrace.

I only booked the room in the 1st place because it had a hot tub.  So that made me upset to begin with...
It was not advertised correctly.  I looked all over so many websites to find one with a hot tub in the room.  It made the little mini vacation much less relaxing than it could have been.

Also the car rental place I booked was horrible.  It was so cheap I was suspecting there might have been a catch.  $64 dollars total when I booked it.  Then when I arrived.

reviews.title: Amazing place by the beach
reviews.text:
My room was huge (with one bedroom) partial view to the ocean but beautiful no need to be oceanfront. The staff was helpful and very attentive. Drinks by the pool are not that good and pricey. 
The waiter by the pool Jennifer she was amazing super nice girl !  I would like to return to this hotel anytime soon !
reviews.response:
Dear Matias,

Thank you for your perfect score and for your kind words! We’re so glad you enjoyed your spacious room and the beautiful ocean view. It’s wonderful to hear that our team made you feel well taken care of, and we’ll be sure to share your special mention with Jennifer. We appreciate your feedback about the poolside drinks and will review this with our team. We’re delighted to know you’d like to return, and we can’t wait to welcome you back for another memorable stay.

Sincerely,

Beach House Fort Lauderdale, A Hilton Resort
reviews.room_type: Ocean View Studio Suite 1 King Bed

reviews.title: Understaffed and not worth the money

The fire alarm went off at 2am which required us to get up and evacuate the building. Front desk short staffed & I felt more like an annoyance, then welcome.

reviews.title: Great management and a wonderful view
reviews.text:
When you stay at a resort one of the things that often makes a trip Great vs just good is the concierge staff and the staff in general. This staff was very good with one great standout being Edward at the concierge as he was most amazing. It dosent  matter what the issue was that made me call down for attention as the remedy was easy for Edward and he made my stay exactly what it should have been and I thank him for it. 
Hilton should be more than happy they have a great team at that location and hopefully reward them accordingly as to lose a man like Edward would be a huge mistake.
Thanks
Brian

reviews.title: Bad service at the roof top bar
reviews.text:
We love the hotel, staff and location.
BUT - the service at the roof top bar is poor. As guests at the hotel er never felt welcome at the roof top bar. On top of this, the service was terrible.
reviews.response:
Dear Per, thank you for sharing your feedback and for your kind words about our hotel, team, and location. We truly appreciate your support and are delighted you enjoyed many aspects of your stay.

We’re very sorry to hear about your experience at the rooftop bar. While the venue is located on our property, it is operated by a third-party partner and not managed by Hilton. That said, we understand how important it is for every part of your visit to feel welcoming and enjoyable, and we will share your comments with their management team to help improve service.

Please know that your experience at the rooftop bar does not reflect Hilton’s commitment to hospitality. We hope this will not deter you from visiting us again, as we would love the opportunity to provide you with the exceptional service you deserve.

Thank you again for your feedback, and we look forward to welcoming you back soon.
reviews.room_type: Ocean View Studio Suite 1 King Bed

reviews.title: Great location, but overall value was disappointing.
reviews.positives: Beach access was good. Pool area and view from rotunda. Available jacuzzi in room.
reviews.negatives: Shower head sprayer was leaking everywhere and hard to adjust water flow. Upon filling the jacuzzi with water noticed it was green, very green and didn’t use. Ice machine located in 6th level wasn’t working. Elevator waiting period was long. Felt rushed during unloading from valet. Failure to communicate available amenities such as swimming pool times, ice machine locations, beach towels and chairs expectations. Would have been nice to have a complementary breakfast offering. Additionally, failure to share nearby tours and available activities during check-in.

Charge for wifi - mine was feee as Hilton momber. Parking fees and additional tax- extremely hush fees . I will not get reimbursed form my work travel expense . I left items in room , lost forever, had to call several times and staff promised to call me back but did not . Eventually I connected with the security person and he was helpful in responding that housekeeping did not find - yet I am CERTAIN THAT THE ITEMS SERE LEFT IN THE ROOM- so where did they go? Gaebage? Home with housekeeper ?

reviews.negatives: She shared the initial room she was given was dirty, the toiletries were used and in the shower. There was a dark streak on the white linens and hair and dirt on the floor. She sent me pictures. I was very disappointed that this was her initial experience. We spent quite a large sum to give her a special weekend away. She said the hotel staff were helpful and gave her another room. However, I am very disappointed her first impression was so tainted.

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The location is amazing and the staff is very friendly.
reviews.negatives:
First I want to say that the stay in the hotel is good but it can be better. The Price is too high comparing to the value and I will state that in details:
There is no clear difference between “Ocean View room” and “Ocean front room”. In the end, they gave us a partial ocean view room which is something we did not expect, despite the very high price we paid.
It is also unclear how they include the breakfast in the stay price. Every guest has a limit on breakfast , so with one breakfast meal, juice , coffee and any dessert , you will definitely exceed the limit and you will pay more money although they said that the breakfast is included. Also, you will pay tips.
The breakfast is good but it comes late everyday. You need to wait between 45 minutes and 1 hour for breakfast!
The hotel is clean but you need to call for room cleaning everyday. They don’t do it automatically as most hotels. You keep calling the front office and they don’t pick up , so you need to go to them and ask them personally to send someone to clean your room.
There are some basic things you don’t find in the room , such as toothpaste, toothbrushes and slippers.
The most annoying thing is that the hotel says that guests have access to the hotel’s beach. But the reality is regardless of how many guests in the room , each room has 2 free beach chairs, and you need to pay for an umbrella. We were 3 people so we got only 2 chairs and paid $30 for the umbrella everyday.
Although the pool closes at sunset, which was around 8 pm , the pool bar closes at 5 pm . So, if you are in the pool after 5 pm you will not find anything to eat. 
There are 2 nice hot tubs beside the pool, but any guest can control them and turn the pumps off or on, which is inconvenient for the other guests. 
Finally, there are very simple things the hotel can fix. I hope they can see this review and make the stay more worthwhile compared to the very high price .

reviews.title: Overpriced, in general disrepair, and not really suitable for families.

reviews.positives: Amazing location but a dated property in need of updating.  No hot water and the bath tub filled with yellow tinted water.  Was told this is normal and that a Ph paper was in the tub to validate levels.  Definitely won’t be back.
reviews.negatives: Please note comment above.

reviews.title: I booked ocean view room . I got the wrong room but after complaining we were given the right room but door lock was bro
reviews.negatives: Need more pool chairs

reviews.title: Great place to stay before and after a cruise, or just for a week to get away on the beach!
reviews.positives: One of the best places I’ve ever stayed the facilities were amazing and beautiful, and every single person on the staff from Bellmen to servers and housekeeping were above and beyond

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Lacked recreational activities.

reviews.title: Such an amazing place to stay I can’t wait to go back
reviews.positives: The beach house was really one of the most wonderful experiences. Every single staff member is kind and thoughtful and helpful.

reviews.title: Very nice hotel with great location with a super friendly staff.
reviews.positives: Just a great location and all the hotels staff were extremely kind and went above and beyond to make our stay enjoyable.
reviews.negatives: After booking I received an email about upgrading room which I did only to find out upon checking in that it wasn't available.

reviews.title: Beautiful location and view and spacious room. Lobby and restaurants were exceptional.
reviews.positives: Location was great and view was phenomenal.
reviews.negatives:
Maintenance in the room could have been better. The room safe did not work. There was dirt/ dust bunnies all over the floor as well as pieces of food. 
We emailed 1 month prior to our visit asking for early check in and the hotel never responded. We waited 5.5 hours in the lobby and the room was not very clean when we finally got the key. Also, the room had a full kitchen but no plates/ cutlery/ cups, etc rendering it useless.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Spacious room and location is good.
reviews.negatives: Everything was good

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.negatives: Paul was a bit small and congested

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.negatives: Everything
